exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your interior design forward
items: Measure and document the dimensions of each room you plan to redesign
Define your design style by creating a mood board with 10-15 inspiration images
Research and assess your current furniture inventory with photos and condition notes
Establish a realistic budget breakdown for your interior design project
Identify and photograph the lighting sources and natural light patterns in each room
Create a detailed floor plan sketch showing current furniture placement and traffic flow
